main_prompt: Cinematic travel photography of Paris 1889 during the Exposition Universelle, 9:16 vertical portrait format, luxury campaign style, golden hour lighting casting warm amber glow, the majestic newly inaugurated Eiffel Tower painted in Rouge Venise (dark reddish-brown) towering dramatically from bottom to top of vertical frame against soft pastel sky, elegant Belle Époque crowds in period-accurate fashion on cobblestone streets in foreground, Haussmannian architecture with cream limestone bathed in golden light flanking the sides, professional color grading with rich warm tones and elegant saturation, shot on medium format camera with beautiful vertical depth of field, foreground sharp with soft bokeh, National Geographic quality editorial photography, aspirational mood evoking timeless elegance and adventure, vibrant but sophisticated colors, atmospheric haze creating vertical depth layers, 8K ultra detailed, immersive vertical storytelling for Stories and Reels, luxury travel editorial aesthetic

composition_notes.stories_reels_optimization: Vertical 9:16 format perfect for immersive mobile viewing, emphasizes towering height of Eiffel Tower, creates dramatic sense of scale and grandeur
composition_notes.vertical_storytelling: Composition guides eye from foreground street level upward through golden-lit architecture to the majestic Tower piercing the sky
framing_options: Option 1: Ground-level perspective looking up, Belle Époque figures in sharp foreground, Tower soaring above in golden light
Option 2: Mid-level view with layered depth - foreground crowd, mid-ground Haussmannian streets, background Tower catching sunset
Option 3: Symmetrical vertical composition with Tower centered, flanked by golden-lit buildings, crowd at bottom
Option 4: Intimate foreground portrait of Belle Époque travelers with Tower majestically rising in soft bokeh background
composition_notes.mobile_viewing: Optimized for full-screen vertical mobile experience, cinematic travel storytelling
composition_notes.safe_zones: Important elements positioned to avoid Stories/Reels UI at top (~250px) and bottom (~310px)

time_period_specifics.eiffel_tower: Newly inaugurated Eiffel Tower in original Rouge Venise paint (dark reddish-brown gradient from dark at summit to lighter at base), iron lattice structure dramatically lit by golden hour, emphasizing its revolutionary 300-meter height in vertical composition
time_period_specifics.galerie_des_machines: Massive blue-grey steel and glass cathedral positioned in mid-ground of vertical frame
time_period_specifics.architecture_style: Haussmannian Paris with cream limestone facades, grey-blue zinc mansard roofs, ornate wrought-iron balconies flanking the vertical composition
time_period_specifics.historical_context: Belle Époque pinnacle, moment of industrial triumph and artistic elegance

fashion_1889.women: Belle Époque elegance in sharp foreground focus, S-silhouette dresses with corseted waists catching golden light, long flowing skirts in luxurious jewel-tone fabrics, elaborate hats adorned with feathers and flowers, lace parasols, long gloves, positioned for mobile engagement and scale reference
fashion_1889.men: Distinguished gentlemen in impeccable three-piece suits and frock coats, top hats for bourgeoisie, bowler hats for middle class, handlebar mustaches and groomed beards, canes and pocket watches, epitome of 1889 masculine sophistication
fashion_1889.styling: Period-accurate 1889 fashion essential, rich textures and fabrics beautifully lit by golden hour, every detail visible in 8K quality

golden_hour_lighting.time_of_day: Golden hour, approximately one hour before sunset
golden_hour_lighting.light_quality: Warm soft directional light with amber, golden, peachy tones, long shadows creating vertical drama
golden_hour_lighting.sky: Soft pastel sky with warm peachy-pink and lavender gradient, light clouds catching golden light in upper portion of vertical frame
golden_hour_lighting.atmospheric_haze: Gentle atmospheric haze adding vertical depth layers, volumetric quality, romantic soft-focus distance
golden_hour_lighting.light_on_architecture: Cream limestone glowing warm golden-beige, zinc roofs reflecting blue-grey with golden highlights, creating beautiful tonal contrast in vertical composition
golden_hour_lighting.light_on_people: Foreground subjects beautifully backlit or side-lit with warm glow, fabric textures highlighted, faces naturally illuminated
golden_hour_lighting.reflections: Cobblestones in foreground slightly damp, reflecting golden light like brushed gold
golden_hour_lighting.vertical_gradient: Natural light gradient from rich warm tones at street level to softer pastel tones in sky, guiding eye upward

color_palette.color_grading_style: Professional luxury campaign color grading optimized for mobile viewing, warm inviting sophisticated, slightly lifted shadows with rich blacks, creamy highlights, enhanced warm tones without oversaturation
color_palette.stories_appeal: Colors that capture attention in fast-scrolling Stories and Reels while maintaining sophistication
color_palette.vibrance: Vibrant but elegant, rich saturation in key elements maintaining natural refinement
color_palette.vertical_harmony: Color palette unified by golden hour light flowing through vertical composition

camera_technical.camera_type: Medium format camera aesthetic (Hasselblad/Phase One quality)
camera_technical.sensor_characteristics: Large sensor look with beautiful color depth, smooth tonal transitions, rich dynamic range
camera_technical.lens_quality: Premium cinema lens rendering, beautiful circular bokeh in vertical format
camera_technical.depth_of_field: Vertical depth of field with foreground subjects tack sharp, mid-ground detailed, background with elegant soft bokeh, creating dimensional cinematic storytelling
camera_technical.focal_length_feel: Medium focal length (50-85mm equivalent), natural perspective with slight compression enhancing Tower's dramatic height
camera_technical.sharpness: 8K ultra detailed where in focus - fabric weaves, stone textures, iron rivets, individual cobblestones all visible
camera_technical.image_quality: Clean professional editorial quality with subtle organic film-like texture, perfect for mobile display

composition.layout: Cinematic 9:16 vertical composition emphasizing height and grandeur, strong vertical leading lines
composition.foreground: Sharp detailed foreground with Belle Époque figures or architectural elements at street level, creating human interest and scale
composition.midground: Haussmannian boulevards, Exposition grounds with period crowds, architectural details
composition.background: Eiffel Tower towering dramatically, sky, soft bokeh creating atmospheric vertical depth
composition.vertical_flow: Composition guides viewer's eye upward from intimate foreground through elegant mid-ground to majestic Tower
composition.visual_storytelling: Immersive travel narrative capturing Belle Époque Paris at its golden moment, aspirational and emotionally compelling

mood_atmosphere.aspirational: Luxury travel mood making viewer want to experience this historical moment, evoking wanderlust
mood_atmosphere.elegant: Sophisticated high-end aesthetic, fashion campaign meets National Geographic editorial
mood_atmosphere.romantic: Belle Époque romanticism, golden hour magic, timeless Parisian beauty
mood_atmosphere.immersive: Full-screen vertical format creates immersive travel experience for mobile viewers
mood_atmosphere.adventurous: Sense of discovery and exploration, excitement of 1889 Exposition Universelle
mood_atmosphere.authentic: Historically accurate while being visually stunning and emotionally engaging

national_geographic_quality.editorial_standards: World-class photojournalism quality, technically perfect, emotionally compelling vertical storytelling
national_geographic_quality.storytelling: Complete narrative told through vertical composition, cultural moment beautifully captured
national_geographic_quality.technical_excellence: Perfect exposure, focus, color, composition optimized for mobile vertical viewing
national_geographic_quality.cultural_authenticity: Respectful accurate representation of 1889 period, fashion, architecture
national_geographic_quality.visual_impact: Immediately captivating vertical imagery worthy of prestigious travel editorial or luxury campaign

negative_prompt: modern elements, contemporary fashion, cars, automobiles, modern buildings, skyscrapers, plastic materials, neon signs, LED lights, smartphones, 21st century technology, bronze Eiffel Tower, incorrect historical period, Victorian England, anachronisms, harsh lighting, overcast grey sky, flat lighting, oversaturated colors, HDR look, amateur photography, low resolution, blurry, soft focus, poor composition, snapshot quality, Instagram filter, excessive grain or noise, lens distortion, wide angle distortion, cluttered composition, horizontal composition, landscape orientation

recommended_settings.color_depth: High bit depth for professional color grading
recommended_settings.dynamic_range: High dynamic range for golden hour highlights and shadows

complete_prompt_string: Cinematic luxury travel photography of Paris 1889 during the Exposition Universelle, 9:16 vertical portrait format for Instagram Stories and Reels, golden hour lighting casting warm amber glow, majestic newly inaugurated Eiffel Tower painted in Rouge Venise dark reddish-brown towering dramatically from bottom to top of vertical frame against soft pastel peachy-pink and lavender sky, elegant Belle Époque crowd in period-accurate 1889 fashion on cobblestone streets in sharp foreground focus, women in S-silhouette dresses with corseted waists and elaborate feathered hats carrying lace parasols, men in impeccable three-piece suits and top hats with handlebar mustaches, Haussmannian architecture with cream limestone facades glowing golden in sunset light flanking the vertical sides, grey-blue zinc mansard roofs with ornate wrought-iron balconies, cobblestones reflecting warm light, professional luxury campaign color grading with rich warm tones and elegant saturation optimized for mobile, shot on medium format camera with beautiful vertical depth of field, foreground subjects tack sharp with soft bokeh background creating atmospheric layers, gentle golden haze adding vertical depth, National Geographic quality editorial photography, aspirational mood evoking timeless elegance wanderlust and adventure, immersive vertical storytelling, vibrant but refined sophisticated colors, every architectural detail and fabric texture ultra sharp in focus areas, 8K ultra detailed, luxury travel editorial aesthetic for Stories and Reels, technically perfect vertical composition and exposure, culturally authentic historical accuracy, visually stunning emotionally compelling, dramatic sense of scale and height, premium mobile content

alternative_prompts.option_1_ground_level: Luxury travel photography, 9:16 vertical, golden hour, ground-level perspective looking up at Rouge Venise Eiffel Tower dominating vertical frame, Belle Époque visitors in sharp foreground with period 1889 fashion, warm amber sunset lighting, Haussmannian buildings flanking, soft bokeh background, professional color grading, medium format quality, National Geographic editorial, aspirational mood, 8K detailed, Stories/Reels optimized
alternative_prompts.option_2_layered_vertical: Cinematic travel editorial, 9:16 vertical, golden hour Paris 1889, layered vertical composition, foreground: elegantly dressed Belle Époque crowd on cobblestones in sharp focus, mid-ground: golden-lit Haussmannian boulevards, background: Rouge Venise Eiffel Tower soaring majestically in soft bokeh catching sunset, warm amber lighting, luxury campaign grading, medium format aesthetic, immersive vertical storytelling, 8K ultra detailed, Reels format
alternative_prompts.option_3_intimate_foreground: High-end travel photography, 9:16 vertical, golden hour lighting, intimate portrait of Belle Époque travelers in sharp foreground, women in corseted dresses with parasols, men in top hats, Rouge Venise Eiffel Tower rising majestically in soft bokeh background, atmospheric golden haze, professional color grading vibrant elegant tones, medium format camera with cinematic vertical depth of field, National Geographic quality, aspirational luxury mood, 8K detailed, perfect vertical Stories composition

usage_notes.for_stable_diffusion: Use main_prompt + detailed_elements, include negative_prompt, use professional photography models optimized for vertical format
usage_notes.for_dalle: Use complete_prompt_string, emphasize vertical portrait orientation and Stories/Reels optimization
stories_reels_tips: Export at 1080x1920px minimum for Instagram/Facebook Stories and Reels
Consider 2160x3840px for TikTok and premium quality
Vertical format naturally emphasizes Tower's impressive height
Golden hour aesthetic creates strong emotional engagement
Luxury travel style stands out in Stories feeds
Position key elements within safe zones for UI compatibility
Test composition on mobile screen for optimal impact

for_reels_tiktok: Slow upward camera tilt from foreground crowd to Tower top (Ken Burns effect)
Subtle parallax effect with foreground Belle Époque figures and background Tower
Gentle zoom in maintaining golden hour atmosphere
Slow motion of parasols, fabric movement in golden light
Fade in from warm sepia tone to full golden hour color
Focus pull from foreground crowd to Tower in background
Time-lapse style showing golden hour light progression (staying in period)

instagram_caption_suggestions: Paris, 1889 ✨ Golden hour at the birth of modern Paris
Traveling back to Belle Époque elegance 🗼 When the Eiffel Tower was Rouge Venise
La Belle Époque in golden light 🌅 Paris 1889
Time travel to the Exposition Universelle ✨ #Paris1889
Golden hour magic at the world's tallest structure 🗼 Paris, 1889
When Paris touched the sky 🌅 Rouge Venise Tower, 1889
